input_text: Signboard kedai ni semua dah pudar. Nak baca nama jalan pun susah. PBT tak ambil kisah langsung.
reason: Frustrated about faded signboards and PBT negligence in maintaining public signage.
suggested_rewrite: Papan tanda yang pudar menjejaskan navigasi dan imej kawasan. Penduduk boleh melaporkan kepada PBT untuk penggantian.

input_text: Hawker food portions getting smaller but price keeps going up. These sellers think we don't notice.
reason: Frustrated about shrinkflation at hawker stalls, consumer complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Rising ingredient costs may affect portions. If you feel pricing is unfair, share constructive feedback with the vendor or choose alternatives.

input_text: 马来西亚的公共交通系统太差了。等了一个小时巴士还没来。怎么发展经济？
reason: Frustrated about poor public transport with economic development concern.
suggested_rewrite: 可靠的公共交通对经济发展至关重要。政府应投资于公共交通频率和覆盖范围的改善。

input_text: இந்த மாவட்டத்தில் குடிநீர் தரம் மிகவும் மோசம். தண்ணீர் மஞ்சள் நிறமாக வருகிறது.
reason: Water quality complaint about yellow-colored tap water in their district.
suggested_rewrite: குடிநீர் தரம் குறித்த புகாரை SPAN நீர் ஆணையத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம். நீர் மாதிரியை பரிசோதனைக்கு அனுப்புவது நல்லது.

input_text: Dah la parking kat hospital penuh. Nak jumpa doktor pun stress sebab tak jumpa parking. Tambah la parking sikit.
reason: Hospital parking frustration adding stress to medical visits.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah tempat letak kereta di hospital boleh dikurangkan dengan bangunan parking bertingkat atau perkhidmatan van shuttle dari kawasan parking jauh.

input_text: The night market vendors block the entire road. Can't even walk properly. And the rubbish they leave behind is disgusting.
reason: Frustrated about night market vendors blocking roads and leaving trash.
suggested_rewrite: Night market management should include proper lane planning and mandatory cleanup by vendors. PBT should enforce these standards.

input_text: 学校食堂的饭菜又贵又难吃。孩子们每天吃不饱。这是什么学校管理？
reason: Frustrated about expensive low-quality school canteen food affecting children's nutrition.
suggested_rewrite: 学校食堂的质量和价格应受到监督。家长可以通过家教协会向学校管理层反映问题。

input_text: Taman permainan untuk budak pun takde. Satu taman dah rosak, yang baru takde. Apa guna cukai?
reason: Frustrated about lack of children's playgrounds, questioning tax utility.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan rekreasi kanak-kanak penting untuk pembangunan komuniti. Cadangan untuk taman permainan baru boleh dikemukakan kepada ADUN melalui surat rasmi.

input_text: Why must we pay for plastic bags now? Government just looking for more ways to tax the rakyat.
reason: Perceiving plastic bag charges as hidden taxation, anti-environmental policy frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Plastic bag charges are an environmental initiative to reduce waste. Bringing reusable bags saves money and helps the environment.

input_text: Sekolah minta sumbangan je tiap bulan. Buku teks pun kena beli sendiri. Free education konon.
reason: Frustrated about hidden costs in supposedly free public education.
suggested_rewrite: Kos tersembunyi dalam pendidikan percuma membebankan keluarga berpendapatan rendah. Kementerian Pendidikan perlu memastikan bantuan mencukupi.

input_text: Delivery rider took my food and marked as delivered. When I complain, app support gives me standard template reply.
reason: Food delivery fraud complaint with frustration about automated customer service responses.
suggested_rewrite: Document the incident with screenshots and escalate beyond automated replies. Most delivery apps have a formal dispute resolution process.

input_text: 小贩中心的油烟味弥漫整个住宅区。居民投诉了无数次都没人管。
reason: Environmental nuisance complaint about hawker center smoke affecting residential area.
suggested_rewrite: 油烟问题可以向环境部门投诉。小贩中心应安装适当的排烟系统以减少对附近居民的影响。

input_text: Lampu traffic rosak dah seminggu. Buat report kat Waze je la sebab authority memang tak dengar.
reason: Giving up on authorities for broken traffic light, resorting to Waze reports.
suggested_rewrite: Lampu isyarat rosak boleh dilaporkan kepada DBKL atau PBT berkaitan melalui aplikasi rasmi mereka untuk tindakan segera.

input_text: These rental scams are getting worse. People ask for deposit and then the property doesn't even exist. Police don't care.
reason: Frustrated about rental scams and perceived police indifference to fraud.
suggested_rewrite: Always verify property ownership before paying deposits. Scam reports should be filed with police and CCID for investigation.

input_text: Nak claim warranty pun susah. Hantar barang repair, 3 bulan tak siap. Lepas tu cakap tak boleh repair, kena beli baru.
reason: Frustrated warranty claim experience, feeling cheated after long wait.
suggested_rewrite: Hak pengguna di bawah jaminan dilindungi undang-undang. Jika pembaikan mengambil masa terlampau lama, failkan aduan di Tribunal Tuntutan Pengguna.

input_text: 每到假期高速公路就大塞车。收费站不开足够的通道。为什么不能全部打开？
reason: Holiday highway congestion frustration about insufficient toll booth lanes.
suggested_rewrite: 假期交通拥堵可以通过开放更多收费通道和推广电子收费来缓解。高速公路运营商应在高峰期增加人手。

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் மருந்தகம் எதுவும் இல்லை. அருகிலுள்ள மருந்தகம் 10 கிலோமீட்டர் தொலைவில் உள்ளது.
reason: Healthcare access complaint about nearest pharmacy being 10km away.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து பகுதிகளிலும் அடிப்படை சுகாதார வசதிகள் அணுகக்கூடியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். இதை மாவட்ட சுகாதார அலுவலகத்திடம் தெரிவிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Kontrak kerja macam hamba. OT tak bayar, MC potong gaji. Tapi nak report labor office jauh sangat.
reason: Labor exploitation complaint comparing work conditions to slavery, overtime and sick leave issues.
suggested_rewrite: Hak pekerja termasuk bayaran OT dan cuti sakit dilindungi Akta Kerja. Aduan boleh dibuat dalam talian di portal Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: Can't even use the public library because it's always closed or under renovation. Where do students go to study?
reason: Frustrated about public library closures affecting students' study options.
suggested_rewrite: Consistent public library hours are essential for students. The local council should provide alternative study spaces during renovation periods.

input_text: Bekalan gas masak pun naik harga. Makcik goreng pisang kat tepi jalan mana mampu. Kerajaan buat tak tau je.
reason: Frustrated about cooking gas price increases affecting small hawkers, government criticism.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan harga gas memasak memberi kesan besar kepada peniaga kecil. Subsidi gas yang lebih telus dan berkesan diperlukan.

input_text: 这些装修工人说好三个月完工，结果半年还没做完。每天找借口。
reason: Frustrated renovation delay complaint with contractor making constant excuses.
suggested_rewrite: 装修延迟可以通过合同条款中的罚款机制来预防。确保合同明确规定完工日期和延迟赔偿。

input_text: Highway rest stop toilet memang menakutkan. Bau, kotor, pintu rosak. Malaysian standard la katakan.
reason: Highway rest stop hygiene complaint with sarcastic 'Malaysian standard' quip.
suggested_rewrite: Highway rest stops should maintain clean facilities as part of their concession agreement. Report substandard facilities through the highway operator's app or PLUS hotline.

input_text: Kursus wajib yang kerajaan buat ni bazir masa je. Orang dah tau semua tu tapi kena duduk dengar jugak.
reason: Frustrated about mandatory government courses perceived as waste of time.
suggested_rewrite: Kursus wajib kerajaan boleh diperbaiki dengan format yang lebih interaktif dan kandungan yang dikemas kini mengikut keperluan semasa.

input_text: Pediatric ward in government hospital is overcrowded. Two kids sharing one bed. This is not acceptable.
reason: Overcrowded pediatric ward complaint about children sharing hospital beds.
suggested_rewrite: Overcrowding in pediatric wards is a patient safety concern. Hospital administrations need more beds and resources to handle patient volumes.

input_text: 停电的时候连备用发电机都没有。住在公寓的老人怎么上下楼？
reason: Power outage frustration about no backup generators affecting elderly residents in apartments.
suggested_rewrite: 公寓管理应配备应急发电机，特别是为电梯供电。这是住户安全和可达性的基本需求。

input_text: Sampah pukal depan rumah dah seminggu tak diangkat. Bau busuk merata. Tapi collection fee tetap kena bayar.
reason: Bulk waste not collected for a week despite paying fees, hygiene and fairness complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Sampah pukal yang tidak dikutip boleh dilaporkan kepada SWCorp atau syarikat kutipan sampah anda. Simpan rekod aduan untuk rujukan.

input_text: Public swimming pool schedule so limited. Only open 3 hours on weekdays. Working people can never use it.
reason: Frustrated about limited public pool hours excluding working people.
suggested_rewrite: Public swimming pool hours should accommodate working schedules. Extended evening hours would make facilities more accessible to all residents.

input_text: கடை உரிமையாளர்கள் வாடிக்கையாளர்களை ஏமாற்றுகிறார்கள். எடை குறைவாக போடுகிறார்கள்.
reason: Accusing shop owners of cheating on weight measurements.
suggested_rewrite: நுகர்வோர் உரிமைகள் நிறுவை சரிபார்க்க உதவுகின்றன. சந்தேகமிருந்தால் KPDNHEP க்கு புகார் அளிக்கலாம்.

input_text: Bayar internet 300Mbps tapi dapat 50Mbps je. Call hotline dia cakap 'up to 300'. Memang scam la.
reason: Internet speed complaint about getting far less than advertised, calling it a scam.
suggested_rewrite: Jika kelajuan internet jauh daripada yang dijanjikan, laporkan kepada MCMC. Pembekal perlu mematuhi standard kelajuan minimum.

input_text: Condo fire alarm went off at 3am again for no reason. Third time this month. Management doesn't care about our sleep.
reason: Repeated false fire alarm frustration affecting residents' sleep.
suggested_rewrite: Recurring false fire alarms indicate a maintenance issue. Document each incident and formally request the management to service the alarm system.

input_text: 公立学校的老师教学质量参差不齐。有的老师根本不认真教。学生怎么进步？
reason: Concerned about inconsistent teaching quality in public schools.
suggested_rewrite: 教学质量的提升需要持续的教师培训和评估机制。家长可以通过家教协会反映教学方面的关注。

input_text: Rumah PPR dah macam rumah hantu. Cat mengelupas, paip bocor, tangga retak. Siapa bertanggungjawab?
reason: Public housing deterioration complaint questioning accountability.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan rumah PPR perlu dipertingkatkan. Penghuni boleh melaporkan kerosakan kepada pengurusan PPR atau pejabat ADUN untuk tindakan.

input_text: Taxi meter always broken. Every time they want to negotiate higher fare. SPAD should do something about this.
reason: Frustrated about taxi meter fraud and overcharging, wanting regulatory action.
suggested_rewrite: Report taxis with broken meters and negotiated fares to APAD with the taxi number and details. This helps enforce fare regulations.

input_text: Projek pembinaan asyik delayed je. Stadium baru pun dah 5 tahun tak siap. Duit lesap entah ke mana.
reason: Frustrated about delayed stadium construction project with corruption insinuation.
suggested_rewrite: Projek infrastruktur yang lewat memerlukan siasatan dan laporan kemajuan yang telus. Auditor Negara boleh menyiasat penggunaan dana projek.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தில் போதுமான பூங்காக்கள் இல்லை. குழந்தைகள் விளையாட இடம் இல்லை.
reason: Lack of parks and children's play areas in the city.
suggested_rewrite: நகர திட்டமிடலில் பூங்காக்கள் மற்றும் குழந்தைகள் விளையாட்டு மைதானங்களுக்கு இடம் ஒதுக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Kenapa la negara lain boleh ada public transport yang efficient tapi kita tak boleh? Malu je kalau orang luar datang.
reason: Comparing Malaysia's public transport unfavorably to other countries, expressing embarrassment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia boleh belajar daripada sistem pengangkutan awam negara lain yang berjaya. Pelaburan dalam infrastruktur dan pengurusan yang cekap adalah kunci.

input_text: The amount of litter on Malaysian beaches is shameful. Tourism campaigns but can't even keep beaches clean.
reason: Beach pollution frustration contrasting with tourism promotion efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Maintaining clean beaches is essential for both tourism and marine ecosystems. Regular beach cleanups and stricter littering enforcement would help.

input_text: 每次去银行都要等很久。为什么不能多开几个柜台？人手不够就多请人嘛。
reason: Frustrated about long bank queues and insufficient counter staff.
suggested_rewrite: 银行服务效率可以通过增加柜台和推广网上银行来改善。顾客可以通过银行的反馈渠道提出建议。

input_text: Kerja kat swasta ni memang macam kuli. Overtime tak bayar, annual leave pun susah nak ambil.
reason: Private sector labor complaint comparing work to indentured labor, exploitation tone.
suggested_rewrite: Hak pekerja termasuk bayaran lebih masa dan cuti tahunan dilindungi Akta Kerja 1955. Pekerja boleh melaporkan pelanggaran kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.
